jd:
初级测试工程师招聘。负责 Web 测试、APP 测试、接口测试、回归测试、缺陷跟踪。

Required basics (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — basic syntax.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — introductory.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — SELECT basics.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — basic commands.
Git Git Git Git Git — basic clone/commit.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — basic ticket creation.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、Jenkins、Git、JIRA 等工具。0-2 years experience. CS degree or equivalent.
